commit.message:
Fix bot 409 conflict: retry with backoff instead of crashing

When Telegram returns 409 (another getUpdates request), wait
5-30s and retry instead of crashing the process, which caused
Docker to instantly restart and repeat the conflict loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add YouTube auto-stop with Replay Line button

- SCENE_TIMES map with start/end seconds for all 12 scenes
- YT IFrame API integration: ytPlayer, ytApiReady, ytEndInterval state
- initYTPlayer(): creates or reloads YT.Player inside #videoFrame div
- startEndCheck(): polls getCurrentTime() every 250ms, pauses at end-1s
- Shows '↺ Replay Line' button after auto-pause; click rewinds to start
- openModal/closeModal/hearActor all use YT API (seekTo/playVideo/stopVideo)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: English learning app through movie scenes

commit.message:
Redesign Daily Challenge section with animated DC card and streak tracker

Daily Challenge Card:
- Animated gold shimmer border sweeping left-to-right (CSS keyframe)
- Gold radial glow behind card title
- ★ DAILY CHALLENGE gold badge + 2× POINTS orange badge header
- Movie title in Bebas Neue, italic quote, actor + difficulty badge
- Live HH:MM:SS countdown "New challenge in" to UTC midnight
- "Open Scene →" gold button wired to openModal()
- Green completion overlay animates in after daily submit or on page load
  when profile shows daily_done_today=true

Streak Card (right of DC card on desktop, stacked on mobile):
- 🔥 fire emoji with CSS flicker animation (scale + skewX + brightness)
- Large orange streak number in Bebas Neue
- 7-day dot row: each column shows day abbreviation + dot state
    empty = not completed, ✔ done (orange), ★ today (pulsing orange ring)
- Milestone message adapts to streak count and whether today is done

Layout: CSS grid 1fr/240px on desktop, single column on mobile

JS:
- renderDailyCard(), renderStreakCard(), streakMessage(), showDailyComplete()
- loadStreakCard() fetches /api/profile on boot/login/register
- showPointsEarned() calls showDailyComplete()+renderStreakCard() on daily submit
- startDailyCountdown() reloads both daily + streak at midnight

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: mirror-app
repository.description: English learning app through movie scenes

commit.message:
Add Daily Challenge feature with streak tracking

Backend:
- get_daily_scene_id(): MD5 hash of UTC date string → deterministic scene for all users
- GET /api/daily: returns scene, date, bonus_multiplier, secs_until_reset
- DB migration: users.streak INTEGER, users.last_daily TEXT
- POST /api/submit: detects daily scene, awards 2× points, updates streak
  (streak increments if last_daily = yesterday, resets to 1 otherwise)
  returns is_daily, daily_bonus, daily_already_done, streak
- GET /api/leaderboard: includes streak per user row
- GET /api/profile: includes streak, daily_done_today, daily_scene_id

Frontend:
- Daily bar above scene grid: scene name + live HH:MM:SS countdown to UTC midnight
- Countdown auto-reloads daily data when it hits 00:00:00
- Gold "DAILY CHALLENGE" badge on the matching scene card
- "★ Daily · 2× pts" pill in recording modal header
- Points panel shows daily bonus amount + 🔥 N-day streak on completion
- Leaderboard: 🔥N streak badge next to username
- My Progress: streak shown in division card

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix prop_key validation: remove V2 fallback, clear keys on API key change

1. Removed V2 fallback from test-prop-key endpoint - V1 failure now
   returns actual error (1002=bad API key, 1003=bad prop_key)
2. set-v1-api-key now clears all prop_keys and prop_key_tested flags
   when the V1 API key changes (old keys become invalid)
3. Bin/clear button now shows for ALL properties with a prop_key,
   not just unlinked ones

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace Web Audio waveform with 48-bar CSS-animated gold visualizer

- 48 gold bars (up from 30 red) using var(--gold) colour
- @keyframes wave-dance: flat (3px) → peak height → flat, infinite loop
- Each bar gets randomised CSS custom properties via JS:
    --wh  peak height 20–48px, arched higher at centre
    --wd  duration 0.45–1.1s
    --wdl negative delay -1–0s so bars are staggered at start
- Animation runs only when .waveform-wrap.on is present (during recording)
- Bars are invisible/flat when idle — no layout shift
- startWaveform() no longer needs stream arg; removed Web Audio draw loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Prevent browser autocorrect/spellcheck from corrupting API keys

Add autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off"
spellcheck="false" to all credential input fields: V1 API key,
invite code, and propKey inputs across all wizard and admin pages.
Browser autocorrect was corrupting API keys for multiple clients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: split leg2 into Node-only (2a) and real Chromium (2b) (#12)

* feat: split leg2 into Node-only (2a) and real Chromium (2b)

Leg 2 was misnamed — it loaded Pyodide in Node.js, never using Puppeteer.
Rename the existing Node-only variant to leg2a_pyodide_node (removing the
unused puppeteer dependency) and add leg2b_pyodide_chromium which actually
launches headless Chrome via Puppeteer and loads Pyodide inside the browser.

- leg2a: Pyodide in Node.js on port 5002 (was leg2_pyodide_chromium)
- leg2b: Pyodide in headless Chromium via Puppeteer on port 5008
- benchmark.sh updated to run both legs and report combined RSS
- README.md updated with new hypotheses H8/H9 for Node vs Chrome comparison
- ADR updated with correct container names

Closes #8 (Phase 1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: harden leg2 benchmark reliability

- Walk full Chrome process tree for RSS (not just direct children)
- Add SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers to leg2a for graceful shutdown
- Pin Pyodide to exact 0.26.4 in both legs for fair comparison
- Consolidate duplicate signal handlers in leg2b

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(mcp-c3/ssh): detect Android/Termux env, use correct SSH key path

Was hardcoded to /root/.ssh/vault_id_rsa (Docker path).
MCP runs on the phone (Termux) where key is at ~/.ssh/id_rsa,
and on desktop at GIT_BASE/vault/A0_keys/ssh/id_rsa.

- paths.ts: add IS_ANDROID detection + SSH_IDENTITY export
- ssh.ts: use SSH_IDENTITY instead of hardcoded /root/ path
- WireGuard IPs kept (Android WG app handles mesh tunnel)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(skills): add /push-github pre-push automation skill

commit.message:
feat(homepage): replace file upload mockup with Hudl URL input in Step 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feature/eig 864 ios client empty food notes api changes (#102)

* Feature: handle nullable analysis and empty food notes

Opt in to backend nullable_analysis for scan endpoints and introduce a noPreferences match state in the iOS client so scans with no food notes render a neutral badge instead of forced 'matched'.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* Feature: extend no-preferences state to photo scans

Use food notes summary to infer a noPreferences match state for photo and hybrid scans when analysis_result is missing, so photo flow matches barcode behavior.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* Fix: show noPreferences when food notes empty

Ensure recent history cards, scan cards, and product detail consistently render a neutral noPreferences state whenever food notes are empty, and add JSON logging for scan history debugging.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* Fix: derive noPreferences from canvasPreferences

Use FoodNotesStore.canvasPreferences.sections as the primary signal for whether any food notes exist, so clearing all preferences reliably flips scans back to the noPreferences state across cards and detail views.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

* Fix: persist first preference selection and allow removal in edit sheet

- Flush preferences to cache when edit sheet dismisses (before reloading
  from cache) so the first-selected item is never lost
- Call preparePreferencesForMember when opening the edit sheet so
  currentPreferencesOwnerKey is set and first selection is persisted
- Use editingMemberId on dismiss so the correct member's cache is
  refreshed after the sheet's onDisappear clears selectedMemberId

Made-with: Cursor

* Fix: prevent duplicate photo scan cards when returning from detail

- Normalize scanIds/historyScanIds case-insensitively and dedupe across
  active and history lists
- Build carousel items using case-insensitive IDs so the same scan
  cannot appear twice even if casing differs
- Add JSON debug logger for camera state on appear to inspect
  active/history/allCarouselItems in console

Made-with: Cursor

* Fix: avoid duplicate photo thumbnails after analysis

- Normalize processed image content hashes to lowercase for matching
- Filter local pending images by lowercase hash so API/user images
  replace them correctly
- Hide local pending images entirely once processed user images
  exist for the scan

Made-with: Cursor

* Feat: add Food Notes prompt card component

- Create AddFoodNotesPromptCard matching empty-preferences design with
  copy and green CTA button
- Reuse GreenCapsule with tighter icon/text spacing and new plus icon
  asset for "Add food notes" CTA
- Wire assets and project references so the card is ready to drop into
  product detail or other contexts

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: rename no-preferences status to Not Personalized

- Update ProductMatchStatus titles and alert titles to use
  "Not Personalized" in product detail header and badges
- Add/update NotPersonalized pill button component to match
  new copy and styling

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: use NotPersonalized pill for no-preferences status

- Swap generic status badge for dedicated NotPersonalized pill when
  resolvedStatus == .noPreferences in product detail header

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: align Not Personalized styling in recent scans

- Use NotPersonalized pill when recommendation is .noPreferences in both
  RecentScanCard and ScanRow
- Tweak noPreferences badge colors in RecentScanCard to match pill
- Update DTO.ProductRecommendation display text to Not Personalized

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: show AddFoodNotesPromptCard when status is Not Personalized

- Render AddFoodNotesPromptCard under product header and dietary tags
  only when resolvedStatus == .noPreferences in ProductDetailView
- Tweak prompt card layout to match new placement

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: refine AddFoodNotes prompt placement for Not Personalized

- Keep AddFoodNotesPromptCard embedded under product info when
  resolvedStatus is .noPreferences
- Ensure layout matches updated design without extra outer padding

Made-with: Cursor

* Fix: Hide food notes prompt without ingredients

* UI: add food-notes CTA for Not Personalized and gate prompt on ingredients

- In ScanDataCard, replace status badge with an Add food notes button
  when matchStatus is .noPreferences, navigating to editable canvas
- In ProductDetailView, only show AddFoodNotesPromptCard when status is
  .noPreferences and the product actually has ingredients

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: allow disabling shadow on PrimaryButton for inline CTAs

- Add shadowDissabled flag to PrimaryButton to optionally remove drop
  shadow
- Use shadowDissabled for inline Add food notes button in ScanDataCard
  so it matches surrounding card style

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: tweak Not Personalized header layout

- Give AddFoodNotesPromptCard a small bottom padding under tags
- Revert to single status badge row and make title label more
  resilient (scaling and tightening) for long texts

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: refine onboarding copy and add spacing under food-notes prompt

- Adjust WhosThisFor headline and body copy and insert an "Or / Join a
  Family" divider row
- Add a small bottom padding under AddFoodNotesPromptCard when status
  is Not Personalized with ingredients

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: add SignInToIngrediCheckSheet view

- Introduce a dedicated sheet for signing into IngrediCheck, matching
  updated onboarding flows

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: unify auth provider buttons into AuthProviderCapsuleButton

- Replace duplicated Google/Apple/guest buttons in WelcomeBack and
  SignInToIngrediCheckSheet with shared AuthProviderCapsuleButton
- Tweak padding and layout to match updated design

Made-with: Cursor

* Flow: wire new onboarding auth sheets into bottom sheet navigation

- Update BottomSheetRoute and AppNavigationCoordinator to support
  SignInToIngrediCheck and WhosThisFor flows
- Hook sheets into PersistentBottomSheet and tweak copy/layout in
  WhosThisFor and SignInToIngrediCheckSheet

Made-with: Cursor

* Flow: return to WhosThisFor from EnterYourInviteCode

- Update back button in EnterYourInviteCode to navigate to .whosThisFor
  instead of the older .doYouHaveAnInviteCode route

Made-with: Cursor

* Flow: fully wire sign-in sheet into remote onboarding

- Allow signInToIngrediCheck bottom sheet to restore from metadata and
  map to heyThere canvas
- Let PersistentBottomSheet size this sheet dynamically (height nil)
- Fix sign-in subtitle wrapping with fixedSize

Made-with: Cursor

* Flow: wire AddFoodNotes prompt to editable canvas navigation

- Pass onAddFoodNotes callback into AddFoodNotesPromptCard so tapping
  the button navigates to .editableCanvas from ProductDetailView

Made-with: Cursor

* Chore: sync project file and simplify onboarding sheet layout

- Update project.pbxproj for sheet references
- Minor copy/layout tweaks in SignInToIngrediCheckSheet and WhosThisFor

Made-with: Cursor

* Flow: reuse AuthProviderCapsuleButton for Continue as Guest

- Replace custom guest button in SignInToIngrediCheckSheet with
  AuthProviderCapsuleButton wired to authController.signIn() and
  .whosThisFor navigation

Made-with: Cursor

* Fix: Not Personalized status and food-notes prompt wiring

- Ensure .noPreferences propagates consistently from Scan to
  ProductRecommendation and into recent scans and product detail
- Use NotPersonalized pill in recent scans and detail when status is
  Not Personalized
- Show AddFoodNotesPromptCard only for Not Personalized products with
  ingredients, and wire both card and scan CTA buttons to navigate to
  the editable food-notes canvas

Made-with: Cursor

* UI: make recent scan status text more resilient

- Add lineLimit, minimumScaleFactor, and tightening to the status
  label in RecentScanCard so long texts like Not Personalized don't
  overflow

Made-with: Cursor

* Perf: ensure food notes are loaded on HomeView appear

- In HomeView.task, explicitly call loadFoodNotesAll alongside
  loadSummaryIfNeeded so downstream features always have up-to-date
  food notes state

Made-with: Cursor

* Chore: remove debug logging and keep local images visible after analysis

- Remove temporary scan-history JSON logging from ListsTab
- Stop force-hiding pending local images when user images exist so
  thumbnails remain stable after analysis

Made-with: Cursor

* Fix: treat misc notes as food notes and preserve scan ID casing

- Update hasNoFoodNotes to consider both structured canvas sections and
  memberMiscNotes before declaring an account empty
- Adjust normalizeScanLists to deduplicate scanIds/historyScanIds
  case-insensitively while keeping the original ID casing for all
  callers

Made-with: Cursor

* Chore: ignore Cursor config and local script

- Add .cursor and create-linear-issue.js to .gitignore so they are not
  tracked in git

Made-with: Cursor

* Chore: stop tracking .cursor and create-linear-issue.js

* Refactor: remove magic summary string checks for food notes

- Treat any non-empty food notes summary as "has notes" instead of
  comparing against the literal "No Food Notes yet." string
- Update hasNoFoodNotes, AllergySummaryCard empty-state detection, and
  UnifiedCanvasView summary visibility to rely on emptiness rather than
  specific backend copy

Made-with: Cursor

* Add noPreferences capsule state and UI

Introduce a new CapsuleState.case (.noPreferences) and update CapsuleWithDivider to render a dedicated label, background color, and icon for the "no preferences" scenario. Update AnalysisResultView to use .noPreferences (instead of .fail) for the no-preferences branch and adjust the Preview to show the new state. This separates the "not personalized" UI from the failure state for clearer UX.

* UX: avoid rating prompt in Not Personalized state

- Use CapsuleWithDivider(.noPreferences) without triggering
  checkAndPromptForRating so we only ask for reviews after personalized
  results

Made-with: Cursor

* fix: Skip restoring preOnboarding state after social sign-in

Accounts with remote metadata still in preOnboarding stage would get
routed back to the sign-in sheet after authenticating, creating an
auth loop. Treat preOnboarding the same as no-progress so users
advance into onboarding instead. Fixes both Google and Apple sign-in.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* UI: Improve sign-in sheet design and fix navigation for new users

- Make "Sign in later" the primary green CTA to reduce drop-off
- Update microcopy to explain sign-in value proposition
- Add filled style variant to AuthProviderCapsuleButton
- Fix restoreState to show signInToIngrediCheck for preOnboarding users
  instead of restoring stale alreadyHaveAnAccount route

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* UI: Refresh WhosThisFor sheet copy and layout

- Update title to "Who do you grocery shop for?" and subtitle to focus on personalization
- Shrink justMe icon to 17x17 for optical balance with addfamily icon
- Replace plain invite text with tappable pill-style capsule
- Add "Or" divider between main buttons and invite link
- Bump sheet height from 264pt to 300pt to accommodate new content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Optimize tutorial video: compress 36MB→3.4MB and fix prefetch timing

- Switch to compressed video asset (app-tutorial-v2.mov, CRF 24 re-encode)
- Move video prefetch to fire immediately when WhosThisFor appears,
  before guest sign-in and sync, so download starts earlier
- Also fixes prefetch not firing at all for social sign-in users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* UI: Improve empty state for food notes bento card on home screen

- Replace generic "No Data Yet" badge with actionable "Food Notes" title,
  explanatory copy, and green "+ Add Food Notes" CTA button
- Detect server-sent placeholder strings ("No Food Notes yet.",
  "No data yet") as empty state instead of rendering them as summaries
- Position CTA above the bottom-right green circle cutout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Centralize placeholder summary detection across all call sites

Extract FoodNotesStore.isPlaceholderSummary() to detect server-sent
placeholder strings ("No Food Notes yet.", "No data yet") and use it
in AllergySummaryCard, UnifiedCanvasView, and FoodNotesStore.hasNoFoodNotes
to prevent placeholders from rendering as AI summaries or suppressing
the no-preferences state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch voyant components to live API feed and fix card layout

- Add useVoyants hook fetching live online psychics from MonSiteVoyance API
- Rewrite VoyantQuickCTA, VoyantRecommendations, VoyantFinalCTA to use live data

Use more conservative time estimates for schedule loading

real-world fetch times. Add time estimate (~2s/school) to geocode button.

Fix portal reply routing and reduce false jurisdiction safety flags.

Route initial submissions through portals while allowing follow-up/clarification replies via email when inbound addresses exist; improve classifier context by using HTML fallback text in thread prompts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add mission completion summary writer to mission-state.sh

Adds mission_write_completion_summary() that generates a markdown summary
when a mission transitions to complete. Gathers task stats from SQLite
(completed/failed/fixed counts, self-correction rate, avg duration) and
success criteria from the mission file. Output is written atomically to
.dev/mission-summary-<slug>.md.

Integrates into watchdog.sh state transition detection so the summary is
automatically generated on the first cycle that detects completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: code review fixes — effectiveModel in fallback, trial plan, UI polish

- Pass effectiveModel to all non-streaming sendMessageToGemini calls
  (was undefined → Pro users silently downgraded to Flash-Lite)
- Allow trial plan users to access Pro model (was blocked)
- Move MODEL_MAP to module scope (was re-allocated per request)
- Fix UpgradeModal CSS: add local @keyframes + animation-fill-mode:forwards
  (modal was rendering invisible due to missing fadeIn keyframes)
- Persist default model to localStorage on init (Test 5 fix)
- Update Pricing.tsx: "Gemini 3 Flash" → "Standard AI", "Gemini 3 Pro" → "Gemini 3.1 Pro"
- Remove stale audit log fallback model string

and gives instant feedback on publish results.

commit.message:
fix: remove post_install from homebrew formula to fix sandbox EPERM (#66)

Homebrew's post_install runs in a macOS sandbox that only allows writes to
the Homebrew prefix, not user home directories like ~/Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/.
Removed the automatic plugin copying from post_install and updated caveats to
instruct users to run wail-install-plugins manually instead, which runs
outside the sandbox.

commit.message:
Use env.UserHomeDir(ctx) instead of os.UserHomeDir() (#4654)

## Summary
- Convert `os.UserHomeDir()` to `env.UserHomeDir(ctx)` at callsites
where context is available
- Makes home directory resolution context-aware, enabling test overrides
- Covers `cmd/completion`, `libs/databrickscfg`, `experimental/aitools`,
`experimental/ssh/internal/server`, and internal test utilities
- Thread ctx through `InstallMCP` and agent `ConfigDir` function
signatures
- Add `forbidigo` linter rule to reject new `os.UserHomeDir()` calls
- Remaining callsites in `libs/git` and `experimental/ssh` (public API
changes) are annotated with `nolint` and left for separate PRs

## Test plan
- [x] All modified packages compile
- [x] `experimental/aitools` tests pass
- [x] `make lintfull` passes with zero issues


🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: cli
repository.description: Databricks CLI

commit.message:
fix: include selected dimensions in sum_distinct PARTITION BY (#20797)

* fix: include selected dimensions in sum_distinct PARTITION BY clause

When users select dimensions alongside a sum_distinct metric, the
ROW_NUMBER window function now partitions by both the distinct keys
and the selected dimensions. Previously only distinct keys were used,
causing rows unique at (distinct_key, dimension) granularity to be
incorrectly zeroed out.

commit.message:
refactor: replace yfinance IV30 with DoltHub API daily refresh

Move IV30 snapshot collection from pull_options (yfinance, candidate-biased)
to a new pull_iv command that fetches from the DoltHub public API, covering
the full symbol universe (~1,430 symbols/day). Incremental watermark from
MAX(date) in IV30Snapshot, alphabet-split batching to stay under the 1,000-row
API limit, exponential backoff on 429/5xx, 2s delay between requests.

New daily IV pipeline (pull_iv → compute_iv_rank) scheduled at 8 PM ET.
Options pipeline no longer handles IV30 or IV rank computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Se reemplaza el intento de embed por un botón "Ver horarios disponibles →"
que abre calendar.app.google en nueva pestaña — simple y siempre funciona.

commit.message:
Add recency bias: seen-ID ring buffer to hide previously viewed content

Tracks up to N recently seen item IDs in localStorage (stashgifs-seen-ids).
On each feed load, seen items are filtered out (with a fallback to show all
if fewer than 3 unseen items remain). IDs are marked seen when a post is
rendered. Configurable in Settings → Layout → "Seen history size" (0–2000,
default 500, 0 = disabled).
